sys_script_include.name: AROPCheckSeeder_LSD

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_de7002e2cf594f148935fb251d851cd8
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_snc_airop.AROPCheckSeeder_LSD</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>AROPCheckSeeder_LSD</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var AROPCheckSeeder_LSD = Class.create();
AROPCheckSeeder_LSD.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {},
    getChecks: function() {
        return [{"module":"LSD","check_name":"Legal Service Catalog Items","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sc_cat_item");
ga.addQuery("short_description","CONTAINS","legal");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=3)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" items",finding:c+" legal catalog items found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" items",finding:c+" legal catalog item(s) found."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"0 items",finding:"No legal catalog items found."};
})()","ai_justification":"Legal service catalog items are the primary intake mechanism for legal requests that Now Assist can assist with. A well-populated catalog enables AI Agents to route, categorize, and respond to legal requests automatically.","remediation_guidance":"Create catalog items for common legal requests to enable self-service and AI-assisted intake.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"LSD","check_name":"Legal Document Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("sn_lg_contracts_repository");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table sn_lg_contracts_repository not found", finding: "Legal Contract Repository table is not available. Verify the Legal Service Delivery plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_lg_contracts_repository");
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var c = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    if (c >= 50) return { status: "ready", actualValue: c + " legal documents", finding: c + " legal contract documents found. Now Assist LSD has sufficient document data for AI-assisted legal summarization and review." };
    if (c > 0) return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: c + " legal documents", finding: c + " legal document(s) found (target: 50+). Limited document volume reduces Now Assist LSD AI summarization accuracy." };
    return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "0 legal documents", finding: "No legal contract documents found. Now Assist LSD requires document data for AI-assisted legal review and summarization." };
})()","ai_justification":"Legal document volume reflects the content available for Now Assist to analyze, summarize, and reference when generating legal guidance. Adequate document volume improves the quality of AI-generated recommendations and search results.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure legal documents are being uploaded and tracked in the LSD module.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"LSD","check_name":"Legal Assignment Groups Configured","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sys_user_group");
ga.addQuery("name","CONTAINS","legal");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=2)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" groups",finding:c+" legal assignment groups found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" group",finding:c+" legal group found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 groups",finding:"No legal assignment groups found."};
})()","ai_justification":"Legal assignment groups ensure AI Agent automated assignments and Now Assist escalations reach the correct legal teams. Without properly configured groups, AI-generated task routing will fail and matters may go unaddressed.","remediation_guidance":"Configure legal assignment groups by practice area or region.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"LSD","check_name":"Legal Matter Team Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("sn_lg_matter_team_member");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table sn_lg_matter_team_member not found", finding: "Legal Matter Team Member table is not available. Verify the Legal Matter Management plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_lg_matter_team_member");
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var c = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    if (c >= 10) return { status: "ready", actualValue: c + " matter team records", finding: c + " matter team member records found. Now Assist LSD has sufficient team assignment data for AI-assisted matter routing." };
    if (c > 0) return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: c + " matter team records", finding: c + " matter team record(s) found (target: 10+). Limited team assignment data reduces Now Assist LSD AI routing accuracy." };
    return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: "0 matter team records", finding: "No matter team member records found. Configure matter team assignments to enable Now Assist LSD AI-assisted matter routing." };
})()","ai_justification":"Matter team configurations determine how AI Agent task assignments are routed across legal staff. Properly populated matter teams ensure Now Assist recommendations and automated assignments reach the right attorneys and paralegals.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure legal matter teams are configured for each active matter.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"LSD","check_name":"Now Assist for Legal Installed","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var sa=new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");
sa.addQuery("scope","sn_lg_gen_ai");
sa.setLimit(1);sa.query();
if(sa.next())return{status:"ready",actualValue:"v"+sa.getValue("version"),finding:"Now Assist for Legal is installed."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"Not installed",finding:"Now Assist for Legal (sn_lg_gen_ai) is not installed."};
})()","ai_justification":"Now Assist for Legal Service Delivery enables AI-powered matter summarization, document drafting assistance, and legal request triage. Without this plugin, legal teams cannot leverage generative AI to reduce manual effort on routine matters.","remediation_guidance":"Install Now Assist for Legal Service Delivery from the ServiceNow Store.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"LSD","check_name":"Legal Request Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){try{var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_lg_ops_request");ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;if(c>=100)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" requests",finding:c+" legal requests found."};if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" requests",finding:c+" legal requests found."};return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 requests",finding:"No legal requests found."};}catch(e){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Check failed — manual verification required",finding:"Script execution error: "+e.message};}})();","ai_justification":"Legal request volume determines the scale of benefit from Now Assist triage and routing capabilities. Higher request volumes mean greater time savings for legal operations teams using AI-assisted intake and classification.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure legal requests are being submitted through the Legal Service Delivery module.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"LSD","check_name":"Legal Knowledge Base Articles","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("kb_knowledge");
ga.addQuery("workflow_state","published");
ga.addQuery("short_description","CONTAINS","legal");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=10)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" articles",finding:c+" legal KB articles found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" articles",finding:c+" legal KB articles found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 articles",finding:"No legal KB articles found."};
})()","ai_justification":"Legal knowledge base articles are the primary source for Now Assist search and AI-generated responses to legal questions. Without sufficient knowledge content, AI search results and self-service recommendations will be incomplete or inaccurate.","remediation_guidance":"Create KB articles covering legal policies, procedures, and FAQs to enable AI deflection.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"LSD","check_name":"Legal Virtual Agent Topics","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sys_cs_topic");
ga.addQuery("name","CONTAINS","legal");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=3)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" topics",finding:c+" legal VA topics found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" topics",finding:c+" legal VA topic(s) found."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"0 topics",finding:"No legal Virtual Agent topics found."};
})()","ai_justification":"Virtual Agent topics for legal enable conversational AI self-service for common legal requests. Existing topic coverage indicates readiness to activate Now Assist conversational capabilities and AI Agents for legal intake.","remediation_guidance":"Build Virtual Agent conversation topics for common legal requests.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"LSD","check_name":"Legal Matter Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function(){try{var t=new GlideRecord("sn_lg_matter_matter");if(!t.isValid()){return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"Required table sn_lg_matter_matter not found",finding:"Legal Matter table is not available. Verify the Legal Service Delivery plugin is active."};} var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_lg_matter_matter");ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;if(c>=50)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" legal matters",finding:c+" legal matters found. Now Assist LSD has sufficient matter data for AI-assisted legal triage and summarization."};if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" legal matters",finding:c+" legal matter(s) found (target: 50+). Limited matter volume reduces Now Assist LSD AI summarization accuracy."};return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 legal matters",finding:"No legal matters found. Now Assist LSD requires matter data for AI-assisted legal triage and summarization."};}catch(e){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Check failed — manual verification required",finding:"Script execution error: "+e.message};}})();","ai_justification":"Matter volume reflects active legal workload that benefits from Now Assist summarization and AI-assisted status tracking. Adequate matter volume enables AI to identify patterns, flag at-risk matters, and accelerate resolution.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure legal matters are being managed through the LSD module.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"LSD","check_name":"Legal Task Volume","order":null,"check_script":"(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("sn_lg_matter_task");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table sn_lg_matter_task not found", finding: "Legal Matter Task table is not available. Verify the Legal Service Delivery plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_lg_matter_task");
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var c = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    if (c >= 50) return { status: "ready", actualValue: c + " legal tasks", finding: c + " legal tasks found. Now Assist LSD has sufficient task data for AI-assisted task assignment and prioritization." };
    if (c > 0) return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: c + " legal tasks", finding: c + " legal task(s) found (target: 50+). Limited task volume reduces Now Assist LSD AI assignment accuracy." };
    return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "0 legal tasks", finding: "No legal tasks found. Now Assist LSD requires task data for AI-assisted assignment and prioritization." };
})()","ai_justification":"Legal task volume indicates the operational workload that AI Agents can automate through assignment, follow-up, and status update capabilities. Higher task volumes maximize the productivity gains from Now Assist task management.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure legal tasks are being created and tracked in the LSD module.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"}];
    },
    type: 'AROPCheckSeeder_LSD'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-08 20:16:54</sys_created_on><sys_id>de7002e2cf594f148935fb251d851cd8</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>AROPCheckSeeder_LSD</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_de7002e2cf594f148935fb251d851cd8</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-08 20:46:24</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
